summary: Completed iteration 4 testing of Lingo Land educational app. All UI refactoring and syllable logic changes verified. Dashboard minimalism confirmed (Mastery Progress and Recent Games removed). Oxford Syllable Engine with Suffix-Merge silent-e logic working correctly - CRITICAL TEST PASSED: 'stalactites' shows as 'sta · lac · tites' (3 units). Word Bank compact '+' icon implemented correctly.
passed_tests: Dashboard: today-activity section EXISTS and displays stats
Dashboard: no-task-prompt shows when no active task
Dashboard: weekly-task-widget shows when task exists
Dashboard: task-progress-text shows 'Progress: X/5 Days Complete' format
Learn page: 'stalactites' shows 'sta · lac · tites' (3 syllables) - CRITICAL TEST PASSED
Learn page: 'complete' shows 'comp · lete' (2 syllables, silent-e merged)
Learn page: 'bottle' shows 'bott · le' (2 syllables, consonant-le NOT merged)
Learn page: 'adventure' shows 'ad · ven · ture' (3 syllables)
Word Bank: add-word-toggle compact '+' icon button exists (40x40 dimensions)
Word Bank: Import button works and opens modal
Word Bank: Shift+Click range selection works on word checkboxes
Word Bank: Generate Weekly Task button creates task successfully
seed_data_creation: Used existing test account with words: stalactites, complete, activate, bottle, organize, elephant, beautiful, butterfly, adventure, dinosaur
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 4 requirements verified. Dashboard minimalism complete - only Today's Activity and Weekly Task sections remain. Oxford Syllable Engine with Suffix-Merge logic working correctly. Word Bank has compact '+' icon toggle for adding words. Shift+Click range selection works for word checkboxes.

features_verified.no_active_task_prompt: WORKING - Shows 'No Active Task' with link to Word Bank when no task exists
features_verified.task_progress_text: WORKING - Shows 'Progress: X/5 Days Complete' in weekly task widget
features_verified.syllable_engine: WORKING - Oxford Syllable Engine with Suffix-Merge silent-e logic
features_verified.stalactites_syllables: CRITICAL PASS - Shows 'sta · lac · tites' (3 units)
features_verified.complete_syllables: PASS - Shows 'comp · lete' (2 units, silent-e merged)
features_verified.bottle_syllables: PASS - Shows 'bott · le' (2 units, consonant-le NOT merged)
features_verified.word_bank_add_toggle: WORKING - Compact '+' icon (40x40) toggles add word input
features_verified.word_bank_shift_select: WORKING - Shift+Click range selection on checkboxes
